GetOntology.description: Returns all entity types and relationship predicates in the knowledge graph.

GetSubjects.description: Lists entity URIs in the graph, optionally filtered by type.

QueryByPattern.description: Retrieves structured data by traversing graph relationships using triple patterns.

SearchContent.description: Find detailed content using semantic similarity search.

ListJobs.description: List jobs (discipline x level x track) defined in the pathway standard.

DescribeJob.description: Describe a job at (discipline, level, optional track) including skills, behaviours, and responsibilities.

ListAgentProfiles.description: List static agent profile (discipline, track) combinations.

DescribeAgentProfile.description: Describe stage agent profiles for a (discipline, track).

DescribeProgression.description: Compute the progression delta between two levels of the same discipline.

ListJobSoftware.description: List the software toolkit derived for a job.

GetMarkersForProfile.description: Get skill markers an engineer at (discipline, level, track) is expected to demonstrate.

GetUnscoredArtifacts.description: List artifacts that have no evidence rows, scoped by person email, manager email, or org-wide.

GetArtifact.description: Get full detail for a single artifact by its UUID.

WriteEvidence.description: Write evidence rows linking artifacts to skill markers. Idempotent on (artifact_id, skill_id, level_id, marker_text).

GetPerson.description: Get an engineer's profile (discipline, level, track) by email.
